title: Feature Root: Staged plan generation and promotion
description: Shared execution root for adding `takt plan --output` and `takt plan --from-file`, including CLI flag parsing, single-pass output flow, file-based promotion flow, and shared persistence wiring.
acceptance_criteria: The feature tree defines a complete implementation path for `--output` and `--from-file` without changing scheduler or merge behavior.
All concrete implementation work is decomposed into focused developer beads with explicit ordering.
Exactly one shared tester bead, one shared documentation bead, and one shared review bead are present as children of this feature.
